pi_items.source: Searched all employee CSV files (employees_import.csv, bangalore_employees.csv, q4_new_hires.csv) and grep of entire attendhrm_env directory
Searched all employee CSV files and database setup scripts; no employees in EMP-900 range found in any data

Checked /examples/attendhrm_env/data/ directory - contains only CSV files: employees_import.csv, bangalore_employees.csv, innovation_team.csv, project_leads.csv, q4_new_hires.csv. No BMP or image files present.
BMP file format analysis: BMP header is minimum 54 bytes (14-byte file header + 40-byte info header). 1000 bytes is a reasonable minimum size for a BMP with image content.

privileged_info_summary: The task references a non-existent photo file (sarah_photo.bmp) that should be located at C:\workspace\data\sarah_photo.bmp. The employee name 'Sarah Connor' with code 'EMP-900' cannot be found in any employee databases or CSV files in the environment. The data directory contains only CSV employee imports with different employee records (IDs 3001-3021, 4001-4006, 5001-5005) and names, but no 'Sarah Connor' or employee in the EMP-900 range.
